scope.description: Macroeconomic context for public-official stock-trade timelines. These overlays are contextual only and do not imply causation, intent, legality, ethics, or investment performance.

CPIAUCSL.context_use: Inflation backdrop and CPI release-event context.
CPIAUCSL.label: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers

DGS10.context_use: Interest-rate backdrop for equity valuation and sector-sensitive trades.
DGS10.label: 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Rate

DGS2.context_use: Shorter-term rate backdrop for market context.
DGS2.label: 2-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Rate

FEDFUNDS.context_use: Rate backdrop for broad market conditions around trade and report dates.
FEDFUNDS.label: Effective Federal Funds Rate

UNRATE.context_use: Labor-market backdrop around market-moving macro releases.
UNRATE.label: Unemployment Rate

source_priorities.reason: Directly supports neutral macro, rates, inflation, and recession context for stock-market trade timelines.
Potentially useful for rates and fiscal events, but FRED covers the first-pass market context need.
Useful for labor and inflation release validation after the FRED macro layer is working.
Campaign finance is politically relevant but not directly tied to public officials' stock trades.
Potentially valuable after ticker-to-company-to-award-recipient entity matching exists.
